error_signature: Node executed successfully, but no data output
title: Incorrect logic in IF node causing no data output
symptom: The HTTPS node indicates 'Node executed successfully', but there is no data output and the target app logs show no evidence of the request.
applies_when: Using an IF node to check for a condition
not_this_if: Data output is missing due to a different node configuration
root_cause: The IF node's logic is incorrectly configured to check for a non-existent condition. This leads to the true condition being executed when it should not be, resulting in no data being passed along.
fix_steps: Change the condition from 'doesn't exist' to 'does exist' or connect the wire to the false condition
Re-run the workflow to check for data output
agent_instruction: Adjust the logic in the IF node to correctly check for the existence of companyId.
